metadata.description: A person in their 40s, appearing female, has olive skin with subtle texture and a few small moles on the right cheek. Her face is oval with a defined jawline. Dark brown hair, pulled back into a neat bun, reveals a slightly receding hairline. Her almond-shaped eyes are a striking light green, set medium apart. Eyebrows are medium-thick and naturally arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. Lips are medium-thick with a natural, soft curve. The person has a few faint lines around the eyes and forehead, and a hint of sun damage on the skin. The expression is neutral and contemplative, with the head turned slightly to the left, looking into the distance.
metadata.anchor: Contemplative expression with striking light green eyes.
